summaryTemplate: {{className}} is the {{patternRole}}. It packages an action as an object behind a virtual execute(), so the action can be stored, queued, logged, or undone without the caller knowing what it does. Pattern body lives at {{file}}:{{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}.
chosenRationaleTemplate: Tagged as Command because {{className}} declares a virtual execute/undo-family operation (lines {{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}), the signature that lets a request be handled as a first-class object.

command_execute_method.note: The command operation. Reifying the action here is what lets it be queued, replayed, or paired with an undo.

runnerUpComparisonTemplates.Strategy: Strategy varies how one step is computed. Command captures a whole request to perform later — the value is deferral and reversibility (execute/undo), not algorithm choice.
